title: Yamato Stands Against Kaido
description: On pages 27–30, this part focuses on Unknown person #25, Unknown person #26, Queen, Unknown person #27, Unknown person #28, Sanji as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Pure Heart contrast

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Ugh, I HATE HIM! I HATE HIM!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: BUT HIS SMILE IS SO SAVORY, I CAN'T HELP BUT AWAIT HIM.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: ...stomp down...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hmmm... hmmm... (humming) but please, with that soup...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: ...on the pedal of love.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah, I can't take it! I'm his biggest fan now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: WAAA WAA

dialogue.speaker: Queen
dialogue.text: SANJIII! POUR ANOTHER BOWL FOR ME!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Hurry, hurry!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Eee Eee

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pipe down! Now line up like you've got some manners!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hee Hee! They're supposed to be on opposite sides...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But here he is, putting the joy of serving food ahead of the challenge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: He truly is a cooking addict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: You have that right, dahling.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: his ability to adapt and make me forget I was in the wilderness was impressive enough.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: But now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...he took a recipe that our chefs need years of training and practice to master...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and replicated it after a single glance at the recipe.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He may just look like a boy with swirling eyebrows ....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but VIA his voyages as a ship's cook...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: ...he's Amassed an incredible wealth of experience!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mmm, I can feel it coming back to me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: My vitality. 🙁

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ooh, did you know that when a boy makes a home- cooked meal for a maiden...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...it means he wants to get to know her better?! As in THAT way. »

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Really? Why didn't you say so sooner, you silly goose?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Wish

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Too shy?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you are, then just put this on and join us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: AUGH! I told you, I'm not wearing that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'd better have high hopes for him, straw hat boy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I GUARANTEE THAT YOUR PRECIOUS CREWATE WILL BRING HOME...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: ...All 99 vital recipes!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 35 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
